title: Core Operations of Relational Algebra
description: A visual representation of the fundamental unary and binary operations in relational algebra, showing how they manipulate relations to produce new ones.
relationships: SELECT filters rows from a relation
PROJECT selects columns from a relation
UNION combines tuples from two relations
SET DIFFERENCE finds tuples in R not in S
INTERSECTION finds common tuples in R and S
CARTESIAN PRODUCT pairs every tuple from R with every tuple in S
JOIN combines tuples from R and S based on a condition
